nasb.text: Then it came about, as soon as Gideon was dead, that the sons of Israel again played the harlot with the Baals, and made Baal-berith their god.

esv.text: As soon as Gideon died, the people of Israel turned again and whored after the Baals and made Baal-berith their god.

cnv.text: 基甸死了以後，以色列人又轉去隨從眾巴力，行邪淫，並且以巴力．比利土作他們的神。

ccb.text: 基甸刚去世，以色列人便又与众巴力苟合，奉巴力·比利土为他们的神明，
